articles.description: When Unai Emery arrived at Aston Villa he declared he wanted to win trophies. He is now just a game away from silverware after a crushing Europa League semi-final win against Nottingham Forest.
articles.title: Aston Villa ready to end 30-year trophy drought after reaching Europa League final

articles.description: Crystal Palace desperately did not want to be in the Conference League - now they are one game from winning it and creating more club history and a "perfect" finale for boss Oliver Glasner.
articles.title: Crystal Palace: Eagles on verge of 'unbelievable' glory after reaching Conference League final

articles.description: An incident involving team-mates Federico Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni threatens to overshadow one of Real Madrid's biggest matches of the season.
articles.title: Real Madrid: Valverde taken to hospital after incident with Tchouameni

articles.description: The International Olympic Committee says a ban on Belarusian athletes and teams competing under the flag of their nation should be lifted but that the restrictions on Russia remain in place.
articles.title: International Olympic Committee lifts ban on Belarus but not Russia

articles.description: Luke Littler beats Luke Humphries to claim a third successive night win and a record-equalling sixth in this season's Premier League.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler beats Luke Humphries in Leeds for record-equalling sixth win

articles.description: Freiburg are through to their first European final after beating 10-man Braga in Thursday's Europa League semi-final second leg.
articles.title: Freiburg beat Braga to reach maiden European final

articles.description: Rory McIlroy cards a first round of 70 at the Truist Championship as he starts his challenge for a a fifth career win at Quail Hollow.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy cards 70 in first round at Quail Hollow in Truist Championship

articles.description: Colombian pop star Shakira unveils her official song for the 2026 World Cup.
articles.title: 2026 World Cup song: Shakira unveils official song for tournament

articles.description: Daniel Dubois responds to fellow British heavyweight Fabio Wardley's "bin-man" jibe by vowing to make the world champion pay for the "disrespect".
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Challenger responds to 'bin-man' jibe before Saturday's heavyweight title fight

articles.description: English teams have reached the finals of three different European competitions in the same season for the first time.
articles.title: Premier League: English clubs reach all three European finals for first time
